## Validation

- [ ] `make public-readiness`
- [ ] `make secrets` when Gitleaks is available
- [ ] `make architecture`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `aphelion eval` gate cited when governor, prompt, lease, continuation, media routing, private-boundary, or self-improvement behavior changed
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Security / Authority Impact

- [ ] No authority, consent, sandbox, credential, or deploy boundary changed
- [ ] Boundary changed and tests/docs were updated
